'''Fugo''' was a [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] and a member of [[Project Decoy]]. Their task was to design and create a [[Human replica droid]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The [[Leia Organa II|prototype]], resembling [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], met its end at the hand of [[Bertroff Hissa]].
